topic: Law, Legal Policy, Court Rulings, Regulation, Compliance, Privacy Law, AI Law, Major Legislation

relevance_criteria: Supreme Court rulings or major appellate court decisions
New legislation, regulatory changes, or enforcement actions
Privacy law, AI governance, or tech policy developments
Precedent-setting cases with broad jurisdictional impact
quality_indicators: Cites specific case numbers, statutes, or regulatory references
Analyzes legal reasoning, dissenting opinions, or implications
Discusses enforcement mechanisms, compliance requirements, or penalties
Provides expert legal analysis beyond news reporting
reject_patterns: Opinion pieces without case law or statutory citations
General legal advice or FAQ-style content
News aggregation without legal analysis or expert commentary
Speculative predictions without grounding in existing law
